title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Sweet Empire: Winter Wars
subTitle: In honour of "The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants," host Wells Adams challenges the empires to create edible 3D movie posters with festive sponge cake flavours; judges Yolanda and Jacques decide which teams sink and which ones swim.

title: Makeover by Monday
subTitle: Jenni Yolo sets out to transform her younger sister's dark, duplex kitchen into a design masterpiece in only three days. Stepping outside her comfort zone in some areas, Jenni makes some bold design choices in hopes her sister will be blown away.

title: Makeover by Monday
subTitle: Jenni Yolo remodels her friends' bedroom into an oasis that will provide a nice escape for the parents of four children. Jenni uses DIY-friendly techniques to transform the space including a custom wallpaper and a faux-denza.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform and is overwhelmed by wedding dress shopping. Plus, Rebecca rides a mechanical shark to the altar.

title: 90 Day: The Single Life
subTitle: John follows his heart to Texas, but Meghan wants more; Natalie's mum invites Michael to visit; Ruben tells Debbie he has concerns about her past; Chantel waivers on giving Giannis another chance; Veronica says goodbye to Jamal.

title: Virgins
subTitle: Despite Rhasha's G-rated sexual experience, her fantasies are adults-only and she's ready to turn them into reality, and pressure from Deanne's friends pushes her over the edge. Alex undergoes a makeover in hope to end his celibacy.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Mee Wei isn't afraid to flaunt her curves, but most bridal boutiques do not carry dresses in her size. Ellice is worried her dress might be too sexy.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Viola wants to impress her fiancé's Chinese family in a red Cheongsam but her entourage disagree. Rihana risks turning into bridezilla when she can't find a dress.

title: Island Life
subTitle: Tim and Amanda from New York City regularly spend their holidays on Topsail Island in North Carolina and have fallen in love with the island. Now they want to leave the big city life behind and move to the island with their children.

title: Bahamas Life
subTitle: Busy London professionals want to find a place in idyllic Treasure Cay, where they can escape their stressful lives and spend quality time together.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Randy assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she'll blow her dad's budget to get it.

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: For the competition finale, Buddy Valastro and Duff Goldman create monster cakes; Team Buddy works on a radioactive dinosaur, and Team Duff makes a Frankenstein's monster cake of mismatched doll parts.

title: The Great Food Truck Race
subTitle: The last two all-star food truck teams face off in a challenge with special ingredients from Chinatown. The teams compete for every last sale as the clock runs down, and in a thrilling elimination by the bay, host Tyler Florence crowns the winner!

title: 30-Minute Meals
subTitle: For Indian takeaway fans, Rachael shares her beef pepper stir-fry recipe. She adds earthy spices and bright vegetables for the perfect quick dinner.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Alex searches for a sexy and sparkly Pnina, Jaqueline wants something unique, and Emily needs her dress urgently cleaned!

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Sarah Sherman Samuel transforms a local juice bar in Grand Rapids, Mich, and tackles the bottom floor of her own house to create a space where her friends and family can gather.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: World traveller and nature-inspired designer Brian Patrick Flynn transforms his mid-century modern home in Atlanta, Ga, with his distinctively vibrant design style to fulfil his childhood dream of living in a treehouse.

title: Super Mega Cakes
subTitle: Duff Goldman and his team go head-to-head with Timbo Sullivan and his teammates, Sarah Ono Jones and Sarah Myers. They are challenged to bake cakes featuring in-depth architectural detail.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: From the world's most luxurious steaks to the season's most vibrant veggies, diners across the country go wild for the homegrown goodness available at farm-to-table restaurants.

title: Food Paradise International
subTitle: Juicy-double stacked burger smothered in bourbon sauce; grilled cheesesteak in spicy peppers; crispy beer-battered pickles.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: After 18 seasons with the Harlem Globetrotters, Herb is ready to settle down and build his dream home with girlfriend Elena; Brian and Mika must finish this big-deal build of their new home in just 100 days.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A family from Honolulu wants to trade in their long commutes for the pastoral life in Waimea on the Big Island; after decades of living in cramped quarters on Oahu, they are hoping to find a property with ample land and entertaining space for family.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: An active professional couple with a toddler have a rental that's quickly becoming too small, so now they're ready to buy their forever home in Idaho's gorgeous resort town of Ketchum.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform and is overwhelmed by wedding dress shopping. Plus, Rebecca rides a mechanical shark to the altar.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: It's Halloween and Buddy's eldest son wants a haunted house to match his spooky cake. Carlo's crew create an intricate carved pumpkin cake.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Rapper Fat Joe wants a cake to celebrate his new hit single, and Buddy's design is as good as gold! Plus, the team create a Gingerbread Man-inspired cake.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Designer, Lauren Bradshaw modernizes a Tudor home in East Nashville.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Sarah Sherman Samuel transforms a local juice bar in Grand Rapids, Mich, and tackles the bottom floor of her own house to create a space where her friends and family can gather.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: Bride Lisa survived the 2017 Manchester Arena attacks and needs her gown to complement her special tattoo. Gok helps find her a wow gown.

title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way
subTitle: Mahmoud reaches a breaking point, shocking everyone and leaving Nicole in tears. Isabel's jealousy threatens her marriage with Gabe. Rishi pleads with his family to accept his relationship with Jen. A cheating scandal is exposed.

subTitle: Princess-to-be Puteri wants a dress fit for her royal wedding in South Africa. Cynthia struggles to trust her instincts in choosing her dream dress.

title: Say Yes to the Dress: Asia
subTitle: Mee Wei isn't afraid to flaunt her curves, but most bridal boutiques do not carry dresses in her size. Ellice is worried her dress might be too sexy.

title: Island Life
subTitle: John and Penny pay visits to Topsail Island, North Carolina, for more than 20 years, and they decide to relocate to the island permanently after their daughter finally moves out of the house.

title: Bahamas Life
subTitle: With six kids and busy careers, an Iowa couple searches for a reprieve from their hectic lives. They fall in love with the island of Eleuthera.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to show he's back as a designer for good! Also, bride Jaqueline is at odds with her mum.

title: Wildcard Kitchen
subTitle: Eric Adjepong welcomes three legendary chefs to his late-night culinary poker game; the stakes are doubled to $10,000 as Alex Guarnaschelli, Rocco DiSpirito and Andrew Zimmern lay their own cash on the line for a chance to walk away with big money.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Robert tries to save the failing Cray Eatery and Drinkery in Columbus, Ohio, from its inexperienced and dismissive restaurant owner before she runs it into the ground.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: Fashion maven Carson Kressley and Chef Amanda Freitag help chefs Maria Mazon and Guillermo Pernot cook up a win against Bobby Flay.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: Scott Conant and Damaris Phillips pull out all the stops, including a full-on dance number, to help contenders Hari Pulapaka and Denis Radovic finish big against Bobby Flay.

title: 30-Minute Meals
subTitle: Rachael Ray prepares an Oklahoma-style Smack Burger; smashing slices of Vidalia onions into burger patties and adding a simple sauce makes them juicy and flavorful; Rachael uses powdered buttermilk and dried spices in easy ranch-flavored tater tots.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform and is overwhelmed by wedding dress shopping. Plus, Rebecca rides a mechanical shark to the altar.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian creates an Edwardian-style parlour and entertaining deck for a family.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian adds fun and function to three spaces for busy mums and their family.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Buddy is tasked with one of his weirdest requests - baking a South African beef jerky cake! Meanwhile, the team works on music box-themed cake that gets them dancing.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Mauro and Madeline are celebrating their 25th wedding anniversary, so Buddy and Mauro recreate the cake Buddy Sr did 25 years ago - and now, Mauro's son takes on best man duties.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: From fantastical French toast and flannel-busting flapjacks to a big-city egg sandwich and Sicilian omelets, diners across the country wake up to unbeatable breakfasts.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Alex Guarnaschelli enjoys gnocchi in New York City; Jeff Mauro swoons over a 14-karat-gold cake in Chicago; a date with Johnny Weir and Tara Lipinski as they light the night on fire with simply perfect pasta.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif.; Duff Goldman takes on the enormous Orca Platter in Washington, D.C.; Ali Khan gets a one-of-a-kind meal in Des Moines, Iowa.

title: 100 Day Dream Home
subTitle: After building for hundreds of clients, Brian and Mika are ready for their own dream home; but they can't agree on a style.

title: Mediterranean Life
subTitle: Property show following people searching for homes in the European sun. A family of seven move from Virginia to Andalucia, Spain and require a spacious villa.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: Kellen and Sonja are new parents searching for a mountain home that will allow them to grow their family in the resort town of Coeur d'Alene, Idaho; she wants ample living space, while he has his heart set on a picture-perfect view of the lake.

title: Say Yes To The Dress: Lancashire
subTitle: Bride Lisa survived the 2017 Manchester Arena attacks and needs her gown to complement her special tattoo. Gok helps find her a wow gown.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Buddy gets into the school spirit with a cake for Sofia's school pep rally. Grace takes a special consultation for a 40th birthday cake.

title: Cake Boss
subTitle: Carlo's team takes a cake order for delivery to all the way to Saudi Arabia. Back home a fight is brewing over the bakery's signature pastry.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian transforms a radio executive's basement into a cool and colourful space where her two teenage children can relax; he increases the finished basement space by turning an adjacent room into an elegant home office.

title: Mind for Design
subTitle: Brian revisits his first clients 18 years after they gave him his break in interior design to transform their kitchen and dining room into the midcentury modern spaces of their dreams; as a thank you surprise, he also transforms their living room.

subTitle: Lindsay has rejected 30 dresses and has zero body confidence, so when Gok finds three perfect frocks she has a dilemma. Meanwhile, Steph is four feet tall and wants a sexy gown for her wedding.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: Since fantastic food is more important to many travellers than museums, hotels and souvenirs, we've compiled all the must-stop food spots across the country that offer a one-of-a-kind dining experience.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Red already bought a just in case dress at another salon, but she doesn't want to settle. Can she find a dress that's just the one at Kleinfeld? Randy gets a blast from the past, and bride Shatava gets a taste of her own medicine!

title: Buddy vs. Duff
subTitle: Cakes inspired by an African safari; the teams have just two days to complete their cake creations before presenting them to their judges, a panel of 50 talented cake artists from across America.

title: Restaurant: Impossible
subTitle: Chef Robert Irvine rolls into Colorado Springs, Colo., where the chef and owner of Momma Pearl's Cajun Kitchen is on the verge of losing his wife and his business if he can't shed his arrogant alter ego.

title: Food Paradise
subTitle: Joints that have upped the Happy Hour ante with outrageous, tummy-tantalizing appetisers, from a Bloody Mary topped with spaghetti and meatballs to lamb chop fondue and chicken wing confit.

title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
subTitle: Brian Malarkey challenges the chefs to create a hearty French entrée and side in 45 minutes, but the pantry is frozen. With access to only one oven, the competitors must serve up something spectacular for judge Aarti Sequeira.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: An active professional couple with a toddler have a rental that's quickly becoming too small, so now they're ready to buy their forever home in Idaho's gorgeous resort town of Ketchum.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: The Kitchen cohosts Sunny Anderson and Geoffrey Zakarian come together to escort chefs Paddy Coker and Greg Lutes down the red carpet and snub Bobby Flay along the way.

title: Beat Bobby Flay
subTitle: The dashing Scott Conant and Eric Adjepong unite with chefs Dane Blom and Emme Ribeiro Collins to gang up on Bobby Flay.

title: Super Mega Cakes
subTitle: Duff Goldman and his team take on cake maker Ashley Holt and her teammates Inae Tirado and Monika Stout. Both teams are challenged to make cakes inspired by the best meal they've ever had.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll; Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice; Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters.

title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate
subTitle: Deli delights, including the best hot smoked salmon in the country, the ultimate cold-cut combo in Chicago, and a fantastic bagel in South Carolina.

title: Food Paradise International
subTitle: A spicy shrimp stew in Brazil; a fire-breathing chili sauce on pork belly in South Korea; saucy red-hot chicken wings in Ireland.

subTitle: Since fantastic food is more important to many travellers than museums, hotels and souvenirs, we've compiled all the must-stop food spots across the country that offer a one-of-a-kind dining experience.

title: Chopped
subTitle: In the first basket, the chefs find that a certain fun food has been wrapped in bacon, and in round two, the competitors present pork and noodle dishes.

title: Hawaii Life
subTitle: A recently married couple escape the snowy winters in Utah for surf and sun of Kauai. They need to be near work and to their favourite beaches.

title: Mountain Life
subTitle: An active professional couple with a toddler have a rental that's quickly becoming too small, so now they're ready to buy their forever home in Idaho's gorgeous resort town of Ketchum.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle and wants a princess dress for her big day. Plus, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

subTitle: Buddy is tasked with one of his weirdest requests - baking a South African beef jerky cake! Meanwhile, the team works on music box-themed cake that gets them dancing.

subTitle: Mauro and Madeline are celebrating their 25th wedding anniversary, so Buddy and Mauro recreate the cake Buddy Sr did 25 years ago - and now, Mauro's son takes on best man duties.

title: Rental Redo
subTitle: Designer Keyanna Bowen has a passion for renovating rental properties, showing one doesn't have to spend a lot of money to make a big impact; she reveals cost-saving tips while updating rentals to help tenants feel more at home.

title: Point of View: A Designer Profile
subTitle: Designer, Lauren Bradshaw modernizes a Tudor home in East Nashville.

title: Say Yes to the Dress
subTitle: Bride Samantha has mastered her weight-loss goals, but now she has to convince her mum to like the dress; a bride has a glam wedding in Puerto Rico.

title: Match Me Abroad
subTitle: Victoria heads to Ireland to find love, but quickly butts heads with her matchmaker. Amber's first date with Keavan goes awry. Harold's mock date ends in a disappointing performance. Arriving in Brazil, Monica meets Luiza to discuss her first match.

title: Virgins
subTitle: Deanne's date backfires when she only has eyes for the waiter. A potential date gets touchy-feely with Alex at tantra speed dating. Sonali's therapist gives her homework to do in bed. Rhasha enlists her mum and sister's help swiping right.
